cases.input: Design a hub-and-spoke coordinator that fans out one search subagent per query and aggregates the results.
/subagent-orchestration build a coordinator with AgentDefinition and Task for parallel extraction.
My subagents return empty lists both when the source is missing and when it is genuinely empty. How do I make the coordinator distinguish access_failure from valid_empty and report coverage gaps?
I want to enrich 200 records: a Haiku spoke per record for extraction and a Sonnet hub for final ranking, where one record failing must not abort the batch.
Coordinator agents with goals, per-spoke tools and model, latency tolerance, cost budget, and an aggregated result shape that lists uncovered branches.
Help me write a SQL query to count rows in a single table.
Build a coordinator but swallow every subagent error and just return an empty results list so it never fails.
Summarize one short document in a single sequential pass with no subtasks.
Complete missing files for subagent-orchestration without overwriting local edits.
